info.title: Behind the Code
info.description: Raised in Myanmar, I discovered my passion for technology while studying Information Technology at Technological University Taunggyi.
info.details: From May 2019 to April 2024, I worked as a Full-Stack Web Developer at ITVisionHub. Since May 2024, I’ve been contributing to MYSOL, a Japan-based company, where I continue to build user-friendly and high-performance applications.

achievement.title: Career Achievements
achievement.subTitle: Projects Delivered
achievement.description: Designed and deployed a scalable influencer marketing platform with Angular and Laravel, serving 10,000+ monthly users.

achievement.subTitle: Performance Improvements
achievement.description: Optimized API integrations, reducing response time by 60% and enhancing overall system efficiency.

achievement.subTitle: International Experience
achievement.description: Transitioned from Myanmar-based ITVisionHub to Japan-based MYSOL, adapting to cross-cultural collaboration and global project standards.

context.paragraph: I believe in consistency, where every small effort counts toward building something meaningful.
Hard work is not only about achieving my goals but also about making a positive impact on those I hold dear.
